author: crispypata
title: Added Guestbook
content:
Hey! New update! I just added a new section for this website for you to place your words ... or whatever... whichever you want to say just to see if there are actual people lurking 😏

The guestbook is partly open for commenting! (Partly because im assessing if it's worth it to pay for custom css)

I've also made some minor stability changes of the site. That's all 👍
